name: Misty Explosion
effect: If performed on Misty Terrain, add 2 Dice to the Damage Pool and change the targeting to All Foes. After performing this move, the User faints.
description: The Pokémon channels all its Fairy energy into a massive blast, shooting out a very painful shockwave. The area is left foggy with mist. If the area is already misty, it channels this mist to amplify the attack. All its power drained, it immediately falls unconscious after.
